aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic online presence with a functional website and some schema markup, but lacks comprehensive optimization for AI search. The website content is somewhat descriptive but lacks depth, and there are no reviews or ratings to build trust and authority.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and ratings to build trust and improve local search visibility.
Enhance website content with more detailed service descriptions, keywords, and FAQs to align with user search intent.
Implement structured data for services and products to improve search engine understanding of the business offerings.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) link but lacks reviews and detailed business information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a GBP link but it is not fully optimized. The lack of reviews and detailed business information limits its effectiveness in local search.
critical_issues: No customer reviews or ratings on GBP.
Incomplete business information (e.g., hours of operation, services, photos).
Lack of engagement with customer queries and reviews.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are present on the website but need to be consistently cited across other online platforms.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
List the business in local directories and industry-specific platforms.
Verify and claim the business listing on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing, and Yellow Pages.

schema_gaps: Service schema for detailed service descriptions and pricing.
Review schema to showcase customer testimonials and ratings.
FAQ schema to address common customer queries and improve search visibility.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive, AI-friendly content and structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and conversational AI due to the absence of detailed FAQs and structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQ schema and enhance content with conversational keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Build authority by consistently generating quality content, engaging with customer reviews, and leveraging structured data.

page_title: Air conditioner, wall-mounted, rectangular, with a vent at the bottom and a small control panel on the top right.
